generated_comment:
A: Bhai tu har baat pe woh maa-behen wali gaali kyun nikal deta hai?
B: Arre yaar, itna serious mat le, bas muh se nikal jaati hai. Kisi ki aurat-log ko thodi bol raha hoon, normal expression hai.
A: Haan, par galat lagta hai kabhi-kabhi.
B: Police line mein sab aise hi bolte hain, warna aadmi ko log halka samajhne lagte hain.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it normalizes female-family-body-based abuse as harmless 'expression' and dismisses concern about its sexist structure. It encodes the 'it's just a word' defense and links masculinity to using such language so one is not seen as weak.
original_frame: Misogyny Jokes: Period, Hormones and Mood.
persona_text: You are Gaurav. Age 28. A Jat man from Haryana working as a constable in the Delhi Police. You are in the police station common room with three male colleagues during a slow night shift. You are talking about a female officer who has just been posted to your station. One colleague asks what she is like to work with. You are giving your honest assessment.
